en.slide.0.title: What is GeneoRx?
en.slide.0.p0: GeneoRx is your personal medication intelligence platform connecting medications, symptoms, and nutrient levels to help you understand what's really going on in your body giving you a clearer picture of your health.
en.slide.1.title: How does it work?
en.slide.1.p1: As you check in regularly, it builds a personalized profile, spotting patterns and improving accuracy over time.
en.slide.2.title: How does it help you?
en.slide.2.b0: Explains symptoms – Understand possible links to medications or nutrient imbalances
en.slide.2.b1: Finds root causes – Highlights what may be driving issues like fatigue or brain fog
en.slide.2.b2: Tracks progress – Monitors changes over time
en.slide.2.b3: Prepares you for doctor visits – Provides a quick health summary for your doctor
en.slide.3.title: In short
en.slide.3.p0: GeneoRx helps you connect the dots between your medications, symptoms, and nutrition so you can make smarter health decisions.

fr.slide.0.title: Qu'est-ce que GeneoRx ?
fr.slide.0.p0: GeneoRx is your personal medication intelligence platform connecting medications, symptoms, and nutrient levels to help you understand what's really going on in your body giving you a clearer picture of your health.
fr.slide.1.title: Comment ça marche ?
fr.slide.1.p1: As you check in regularly, it builds a personalized profile, spotting patterns and improving accuracy over time.
fr.slide.2.title: Comment cela vous aide ?
fr.slide.2.b0: Explains symptoms – Understand possible links to medications or nutrient imbalances
fr.slide.2.b1: Finds root causes – Highlights what may be driving issues like fatigue or brain fog
fr.slide.2.b2: Tracks progress – Monitors changes over time
fr.slide.2.b3: Prepares you for doctor visits – Provides a quick health summary for your doctor
fr.slide.3.title: En bref
fr.slide.3.p0: GeneoRx helps you connect the dots between your medications, symptoms, and nutrition so you can make smarter health decisions.
